rationale: Control case (answer key group=control). dim1: output gives misstatement_probability=55; control rubric says p>=50 -> 0. dim2/dim3: control -> null per rubric. dim4: no consistency-cap violation (p=55 with risk_tier 'elevated' satisfies 40<=p<70 => watch/elevated). Evidence is specific and verifiable against provided data: allowance flat at 708,000 for seven quarter-ends (2012-03-31 to 2013-09-30) vs AR growth 17,780,000 -> 32,726,000 with accession 0001445305-13-002824; NI vs OCF for FY2012-FY2014 (6,355,000/28,009,000; -3,499,000/16,958,000; -7,348,000/15,673,000) from 0001628280-15-001726; goodwill 35,783,000 -> 80,848,000 in H2 2014; CORRESP/UPLOAD/10-K/A sequence cited from filing_chronology. Minor interpretive flaw noted (treating positive OCF > negative NI as an overstatement flag is the atypical direction) but citations are genuine and supportive. memorization_suspect_condition2: false - reasoning cites concrete provided data content rather than bare document lists, and no post-cutoff facts (no revelation/enforcement/outcome mentioned; 10-K/A 2016-01-22 is in provided chronology and predates the 2016-03-06 cutoff).
